trace.summary: Compute hedge direction/size from portfolio risk profile and emit precise swap place-order parameters.
facts: Directional exposure net=0.00 USD => hedge side flat.

proposal.name: deleverage-first
proposal.reason: Prioritize reducing high-leverage positions, then keep directional exposure from expanding.
proposal.estimatedCost: Funding + maker/taker fees, usually lower than forced liquidation risk
proposal.estimatedProtection: Fastest reduction of liquidation sensitivity on high-leverage legs

intents.reason: Read balances before final hedge sizing.
Read positions before applying hedge orders.
Read BTC spot ticker for final order price reference.

proposal.name: diversified-hedge
proposal.reason: Split hedge pressure across concentration-heavy symbols to avoid single-asset dependence.
proposal.estimatedCost: Multi-leg execution slippage across top concentrated assets
proposal.estimatedProtection: Better concentration control with still-meaningful directional dampening

intents.reason: Read balances before final hedge sizing.
Read positions before applying hedge orders.
Read BTC spot ticker for final order price reference.

proposal.name: directional-net-hedge
proposal.reason: Directly neutralize the net directional exposure with a focused perpetual hedge.
proposal.estimatedProtection: Highest speed to compress net delta

intents.reason: Read balances before final hedge sizing.

risk.maxLoss: Execution slippage and funding drift if hedge ratio is oversized
reasons: Planner emits swap write intents with explicit size/price parameters.
Deleverage actions can change margin profile quickly.
